name: Buywhere Product Catalog
description: Cross-border product discovery with intelligent market matching, price comparison, and affiliate attribution across Singapore, China, and global markets.

skills.name: Product Search
skills.description: Search products by keyword, category, price range, and market
examples: Find Dyson hair dryer under 400 SGD in Singapore
Organic shampoo in China under 100 CNY

skills.name: Cross-Border Product Matching
skills.description: Find equivalent products across different markets with price and spec comparison
examples: What is the China equivalent of this Singapore shampoo?
Find the cheapest market for iPhone 16 Pro Max

skills.name: Price History & Alerts
skills.description: Retrieve historical price data and set up price drop alerts
examples: Show me 30-day price history for this product
Alert me when this drops below 50 SGD

skills.name: Merchant & Affiliate Discovery
skills.description: Discover merchants selling a product and retrieve affiliate links
examples: Which merchants sell this product in China?
Get affiliate link for this Singapore merchant
